title: Superalloys
description: Superalloys is a mod that adds a lot of new materials, tools and weapons to your game.
body:
The main feature of the mod is the templates. There are 5 of them in the mod, each of them is responsible for its own level of tools, and each template is made from the previous one. Also in the mod, to craft some tools or templates, you need to kill a mob or boss, for variety. The best tools in the mod are vibrating tools.

_Supported languages: English: 100% Russian: 100% Spanish: 5%_
